title: AMORS - Additional Mod Origin Realms Support
description: A resource pack that adds additional support for origin realms to mods.
body:
### AMORS is a resource pack with the goal to let mods work better on Origin Realms.

This pack has no affiliation with any mods included, or with Origin Realms/Piston Solutions

**Songs from the Aether are not owned or affiliated by me. They are ported and created by Emile Van Krieken and the Aether Team, and are subject to removal if requested by Aether team. They exist only to do what Origin Realms can't, and add music to their aether biome.**

Please submit mod support ideas to the discord.

Supported Mods:
- Traveler's Titles (Formerly, now supported natively by Origin Realms)
- Biome Titles (Formerly, now supported natively by Origin Realms)
- Eating Animations
- Loading Backgrounds
- Custom Music with the ORSTASH mod

Music Credits:
- C418 (Flake)
- Emile Van Krieken (All Aether Songs)
- Alexander Nakarada (Ethereal Guitars)
